itemno: Item index from the run stimuli table.
response: Recoded key response signalling the 1-4 Likert-rating of adjective + noun match.
counterbalance: 1 or 2; determines the response mapping to hands.
arousal: Arousal rating of the noun–adjective combination.
concreteness: Concreteness rating of the noun–adjective combination.
imageability: Imageability rating of the noun–adjective combination.
meaningfulness: Meaningfulness rating of the noun–adjective combination.
cosine: Cosine similarity metric for the noun–adjective pair.
